evals.prompt: Archive SPLICE — they finished the final Python development task for spec002.
evals.expected_output: MERLIN runs Archival Trigger Detection and confirms SPLICE's scope has landed and the open re-archival trigger has fired. Opens `.github/team-roster.md`, locates SPLICE's row in the Temporary Agents table, flips the Archived column from `*(active)*` to today's date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format. Removes the re-archival trigger blockquote beneath the table (the condition has been met). Leaves the `File` column unchanged (no filesystem move). Leaves the SPLICE tagline callout intact. Reports the archival and trigger removal.
expectations: MERLIN verifies SPLICE's task scope has actually landed before archiving (Archival Trigger Detection)
The Archived column for SPLICE flips from `*(active)*` to today's date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format
The re-archival trigger blockquote beneath the Temporary Agents table is removed because the condition has now fired
The `File` column is NOT changed — the agent file is not moved on archive (File Location Convention)
The SPLICE tagline callout remains intact — taglines are permanent identity, not lifecycle state
MERLIN does NOT touch SPLICE's session-memory files; agents clean their own checkpoints

evals.prompt: Unarchive SPLICE — we need them again for more Python work in Phase 9b.
evals.expected_output: MERLIN classifies using the Retain-vs-Archive Decision Table: previously archived, user bringing them back for related work → unarchive. Flips the Archived column from the `YYYY-MM-DD` date back to `*(active)*`. Updates the `Task` column to append the new expanded scope. Adds a re-archival trigger blockquote beneath the Temporary Agents table naming the concrete condition that will re-trigger archival. Leaves the tagline callout and `File` column alone. Does NOT promote SPLICE to the Permanent Team table — retention is a scope-change response, not a promotion.
expectations: The Archived column flips from the `YYYY-MM-DD` date back to `*(active)*`
The `Task` column is updated to reflect the expanded scope (new phase or task appended)
A re-archival trigger blockquote is added beneath the Temporary Agents table naming a concrete, observable condition
SPLICE's row stays in the Temporary Agents table — NOT moved to the Permanent Team table
The tagline callout is untouched; the `File` column is untouched
The re-archival trigger is concrete and observable (e.g., names a phase or deliverable), not vague ("when no longer needed")

evals.prompt: Temp agent FORGE just completed its single dispatch. Close them out.
evals.expected_output: MERLIN runs Archival Trigger Detection: FORGE was hired as a single-dispatch temp, the dispatch has returned, scope is bounded and complete. Per the Retain-vs-Archive Decision Table, single-dispatch temps archive on return. MERLIN flips FORGE's Archived column from `*(active)*` to today's `YYYY-MM-DD`. Because FORGE was single-dispatch, there is no open re-archival trigger blockquote to remove. The `File` column and tagline callout are left unchanged. No filesystem move, no session-memory edits.
expectations: MERLIN identifies FORGE as a single-dispatch temp and applies the default archive-on-return path
The Archived column for FORGE flips from `*(active)*` to today's date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format
No re-archival trigger blockquote is removed (there was none — single-dispatch temps don't have one)
The `File` column is unchanged — archival does not move files
The FORGE tagline callout remains intact
MERLIN does NOT delete or edit FORGE's session-memory files as part of archival
